# UC Execute Sprint Prompt
# Generated by autopilot - DO NOT EDIT MANUALLY
# Placeholders: {{SPRINT}}, {{PROJECT_DIR}}, {{PADDED_SPRINT}}, {{SPRINT_DIR}}, {{SPRINT_NAME}}

You are executing the UC execute-sprint workflow for Sprint {{SPRINT}}.

## Objective

Execute all plans in Sprint {{SPRINT}}, implementing Task use cases and verifying Epic scenarios are achievable.

## Context Files to Read

Read these files first:
- {{PROJECT_DIR}}/.planning/PROJECT.md
- {{PROJECT_DIR}}/.planning/PROJECT-PLAN.md
- {{PROJECT_DIR}}/.planning/config.json
- {{PROJECT_DIR}}/{{SPRINT_DIR}}/ (all *-PLAN.md files)

## Agent Instructions

Read the executor and verifier agent instructions:
- {{PROJECT_DIR}}/.claude/agents/uc-executor.md
- {{PROJECT_DIR}}/.claude/agents/uc-verifier.md

## Process

### 1. Validate Sprint

```bash
# Check PLAN.md files exist
PLAN_COUNT=$(ls "{{PROJECT_DIR}}/{{SPRINT_DIR}}"/*-PLAN.md 2>/dev/null | wc -l)
if [ "$PLAN_COUNT" -eq 0 ]; then
  echo "ERROR: No PLAN.md files found. Run /esf:plan-sprint {{SPRINT}} first."
  exit 1
fi
```

### 2. Load Config

```bash
MODEL_PROFILE=$(cat {{PROJECT_DIR}}/.planning/config.json 2>/dev/null | grep -o '"model_profile"[[:space:]]*:[[:space:]]*"[^"]*"' | grep -o '"[^"]*"$' | tr -d '"' || echo "balanced")
DO_VERIFY=$(cat {{PROJECT_DIR}}/.planning/config.json 2>/dev/null | grep -o '"verifier"[[:space:]]*:[[:space:]]*[^,}]*' | grep -o 'true\|false' || echo "true")
PARALLELIZATION=$(cat {{PROJECT_DIR}}/.planning/config.json 2>/dev/null | grep -o '"parallelization"[[:space:]]*:[[:space:]]*[^,}]*' | grep -o 'true\|false' || echo "true")
```

Model resolution:
| Agent | quality | balanced | budget |
|-------|---------|----------|--------|
| uc-executor | opus | sonnet | sonnet |
| uc-verifier | sonnet | sonnet | haiku |

### 3. Discover Plans and Sub-Sprints

Parse each PLAN.md file for:
- Plan number
- Sub-Sprint assignment
- Autonomous flag

Group plans by sub-sprint for sequential sub-sprint execution.

### 4. Execute Plans by Sub-Sprint

For each sub-sprint (sequentially):

Display:
```
UC > EXECUTING SPRINT {{SPRINT}}
Sprint: {{SPRINT_NAME}}
Plans: [count]
Sub-Sprints: [count]

Sub-Sprint [N] of [total]
Spawning [count] executor(s)...
```

Spawn uc-executor for EACH plan in the sub-sprint (parallel if enabled):
```
Task(
  prompt="Read {{PROJECT_DIR}}/.claude/agents/uc-executor.md for your role.

Execute plan [PLAN_NUM] for Sprint {{SPRINT}}.

Plan file: {{SPRINT_DIR}}/{{PADDED_SPRINT}}-[NN]-PLAN.md

Instructions:
1. Implement each task per task specification
2. Verify against task criteria
3. Run 'Agent Browser Test:' commands from PLAN.md verification section (if present)
4. Capture screenshots as evidence in {{PROJECT_DIR}}/.agent-browser/
5. Commit atomically per task
6. Update task status to Implemented
7. Create {{PADDED_SPRINT}}-[NN]-SUMMARY.md with screenshot references
8. Return EXECUTION COMPLETE

Read tasks from: {{PROJECT_DIR}}/.planning/use-cases/task/

Screenshot naming: YYYY-MM-DD_HHMMSS_description.png

CRITICAL API Verification:
- Intercept fetch calls to verify API calls
- Check request body has ALL required fields (no undefined!)
- Verify data persists after reload
- Cross-reference store field names exactly
",
  subagent_type="uc-executor",
  description="Execute plan [PLAN_NUM]"
)
```

Wait for all plans in sub-sprint to complete before starting next sub-sprint.

### 5. Post-Execution Verification

If verifier is enabled:

Display:
```
UC > VERIFYING SCENARIOS
Spawning uc-verifier...
```

Spawn uc-verifier agent:
```
Task(
  prompt="Read {{PROJECT_DIR}}/.claude/agents/uc-verifier.md for your role.

Verify Epic use case scenarios are achievable for Sprint {{SPRINT}}.

Sprint Directory: {{SPRINT_DIR}}

Instructions:
1. Walk each Epic scenario step by step
2. Browser test UI scenarios with agent-browser
3. Verify postconditions achievable
4. Test alternative and exception flows
5. Create {{PADDED_SPRINT}}-VERIFICATION.md
6. Update use case statuses in index.md
7. Return VERIFICATION COMPLETE with status

Read summaries from: {{SPRINT_DIR}}/*-SUMMARY.md
Read use cases from: {{PROJECT_DIR}}/.planning/use-cases/
",
  subagent_type="uc-verifier",
  description="Verify scenarios"
)
```

### 6. Present Results

Check VERIFICATION.md status and present appropriate result:

**If verification PASSED:**
```
UC > SPRINT {{SPRINT}} COMPLETE

## Use Case Status
| Epic | Scenarios | Passed | Status |
|-----------|-----------|--------|--------|
| UC-EP-XXX | N | N | Verified |

## Tasks Implemented
| ID | Name | Status |
|----|------|--------|
| UC-TK-XXX | [name] | Implemented |

## Screenshots
[List of captured screenshots]

## Next Up
/esf:progress - check overall project progress
/esf:plan-sprint [N+1] - plan next sprint
```

**If GAPS found:**
```
UC > SPRINT {{SPRINT}} GAPS FOUND

## Verification Results
| Epic | Scenarios | Passed | Failed |
|-----------|-----------|--------|--------|
| UC-EP-XXX | N | M | K |

## Gaps Identified
| Use Case | Step | Issue |
|----------|------|-------|
| UC-EP-XXX | N | [description] |

## Action Required
/esf:plan-sprint {{SPRINT}} --gaps - create gap closure plans
```

### 7. Update PROJECT-STATUS.md

Update current sprint status in {{PROJECT_DIR}}/.planning/PROJECT-STATUS.md

## Success Criteria

- [ ] Sprint validated with PLAN.md files
- [ ] Plans grouped by sub-sprint
- [ ] uc-executor spawned for each plan
- [ ] Parallel execution within sub-sprints
- [ ] All tasks implemented per task specs
- [ ] Atomic commits per task
- [ ] SUMMARY.md created for each plan
- [ ] uc-verifier spawned (if enabled)
- [ ] Scenarios walked with browser testing
- [ ] VERIFICATION.md created with evidence
- [ ] Use case statuses updated in index.md
- [ ] PROJECT-STATUS.md updated with progress
- [ ] Clear outcome: COMPLETE or GAPS FOUND

## Output

Return one of:
- "EXECUTION COMPLETE - VERIFIED" (all scenarios passed)
- "EXECUTION COMPLETE - GAPS FOUND" (some scenarios failed)
- "EXECUTION FAILED" (with error details)
